log: |rule|Stadium Sleep Clause: Limit one foe put to sleep
|rule|Freeze Clause Mod: Limit one foe frozen
|rule|Species Clause: Limit one of each Pokémon
|rule|Endless Battle Clause: Forcing endless battles is banned
|rule|Event Moves Clause: Event-only moves are banned
|rule|Beat Up Nicknames Mod: Beat Up will not reveal any party members
|-hint|In Gen 2, moves with a 100% secondary effect chance will not trigger in 1/256 uses.
